neg_downstream_queue.name: neg_downstream_queue
neg_downstream_queue.description: Negative downstream queue, a raw neighboring-link congestion signal.

downstream_slack.name: downstream_slack
downstream_slack.description: Downstream residual storage/capacity slack for the receiving link.

pressure_backpressure.name: pressure_backpressure
pressure_backpressure.description: Ordinary pressure/backpressure score from the LP summary weights.

dual_sensitivity.name: dual_sensitivity
dual_sensitivity.description: Genuine movement-level dual-sensitivity value from summarize_scenario().

random_price.name: random_price
random_price.description: Permuted dual-sensitivity placebo preserving the dual-value distribution.

phase3_candidate_diagnostics.note: Non-gating candidate diagnostics only; Phase 3 owns dual-vs-pressure claim routing.

summary.rule_text:
Run: library=local_only, max_atoms=1, max_neighbor_atoms=1, max_dual_atoms=1, max_placebo_atoms=1
Counts: program=1, neighbor=0, dual=0, placebo=0, pressure=0, raw_neighbor=0, capacity=0
Regret: total=405.3824, mean=25.3364, max=101.4816; action_agreement=0.75; solve_time_sec=0.002130097011
Rule: choose movement m maximizing score(m)
score(m) = 0.1 * (q_up(m))  # upstream_queue
Selected atoms:
- upstream_queue: weight=0.1, family=local, expression=q_up(m)
Note: atom values are normalized by training-sample max absolute value before scoring.
Note: this is plain-text audit output only; Phase 2 does not execute or deploy rendered rules.
